All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

G

G100 - Static variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Very light green (secondary button fill).
G200 - Static variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Lighter green (borders).
G300 - Static variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Light green (muted accents).
G50 - Static variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Near-white green tint (page/input background).
G500 - Static variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Brand green (primary buttons, section labels).
G600 - Static variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Mid-dark green (hover / OK log text).
G700 - Static variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Dark green (primary text on light surfaces).
G800 - Static variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Darkest green (topbar background).
GAP_SIZE - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.ParamField
The reserved capacity buffer held back from booking (park.gap_size).
gapSize - Variable in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
The reserved capacity buffer held back from maxCapacity.
gapSize - Variable in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Reserved capacity buffer subtracted from maxCapacity when booking.
gapValue - Variable in class client.view.ParkParamsController
Current gap-size value.
GateController - Class in client.view
The park-gate screen, visible to a PARK_EMPLOYEE only (gated in MainShellController; the server also re-checks the role on every op).
GateController(NetworkService, Session) - Constructor for class client.view.GateController
Creates the gate controller.
generateBtn - Variable in class client.view.CancellationsReportController
Runs the report.
generateBtn - Variable in class client.view.VisitsReportController
Runs the report.
get(String) - Method in class common.dto.ClientRequest
Returns data stored under the given key.
get(String) - Static method in class server.db.DotEnv
Returns the value loaded for a key from the .env file.
GET_PARK - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Fetch the logged-in park manager's own park.
GET_RESERVATION - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.RequestType
Fetch a single reservation by id.
getAcknowledgedAt() - Method in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Returns the acknowledgement timestamp (string form), or null while unread.
getActorId() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns the logged-in actor's id (the user id for staff, the national id for a visitor), or -1 if logged out.
getAvailable() - Method in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
Returns the remaining headroom (may be negative if over the gap-adjusted limit).
getAvgPerDay() - Method in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Returns average cancellations+no-shows per calendar day of the inclusive range.
getAvgStayMinutes() - Method in class common.dto.VisitsReportRow
Returns the average stay in minutes over the closed visits (0 if none closed).
getBody() - Method in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Returns the message body.
getById(int) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Looks up a single notification by its primary key, with the recipient's contact joined in for NotificationDTO.getSimulatedTarget().
getById(int) - Method in class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
Looks up a single change request by its primary key.
getById(int) - Method in class server.dao.ParkDAO
Looks up a single park by its primary key.
getById(int) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Looks up a single reservation by its primary key.
getById(int) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Looks up a single queue entry by its primary key.
getByManager(int) - Method in class server.dao.ParkDAO
Looks up the park a given staff user manages (via park.manager_id).
getByReservation(int) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Looks up the queue entry for a given reservation.
getCancelled() - Method in class common.dto.CancellationsReportRow
Returns reservations cancelled that day.
getCategory() - Method in class common.dto.VisitsReportRow
Returns the visitor category ("INDIVIDUALS" or "GROUPS").
getChannel() - Method in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Returns the delivery channel (SIM_EMAIL/SIM_SMS/POPUP).
getConfirmationCode() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the booking confirmation code, or null if not yet issued.
getConfirmTimeoutMinutes() - Static method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerConfig
How long a PENDING reservation may sit before auto-expiry, in minutes (session b).
getConnectedAt() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
Returns the connection time.
getConnection() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns the active connection, or null if not connected.
getConnection() - Static method in class server.db.DBConnection
Creates and returns an active connection to the database.
getCorrelationId() - Method in class common.dto.ClientRequest
Returns the correlation id matching this request to its response.
getCorrelationId() - Method in class common.dto.ServerResponse
Returns the correlation id matching this reply to its request.
getCreatedAt() - Method in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Returns the creation timestamp (string form).
getCreatedAt() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns the creation timestamp (string form), or null.
getCreatedAt() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the creation timestamp as a string.
getCurrent() - Method in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
Returns the number of people currently inside the park.
getData() - Method in class common.dto.ServerResponse
Returns the response payload, or null if none.
getDate() - Method in class common.dto.CancellationsReportRow
Returns the calendar day, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
getDecidedAt() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns the decision timestamp (string form), or null while PENDING.
getDecidedBy() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns the id of the deciding department manager, or null while PENDING.
getDefaultStayMinutes() - Method in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Returns the default visit length in minutes.
getDeltaCents() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationUpdateResultDTO
Returns the price change, in cents (positive = increase, negative = refund)..
getDisplayName() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns the display name of whoever is logged in, or "" if no one.
getEmail() - Method in class common.dto.VisitorDTO
Returns the contact email on file, or null if none recorded.
getEnteredAt() - Method in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Returns the entry timestamp as a string.
getEntity() - Method in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Returns the logical entity name (e.g. "Order") this event refers to.
getEntityId() - Method in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Returns the primary-key identifier of the affected row.
getExitedAt() - Method in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Returns the exit timestamp as a string, or null while the party is still inside.
getField() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns which park parameter the change targets.
getFromDate() - Method in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Returns the inclusive range start, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
getFromDate() - Method in class common.dto.VisitsReportDTO
Returns the inclusive range start, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
getFullName() - Method in class common.dto.UserDTO
Returns the display name of the user.
getFullName() - Method in class common.dto.VisitorDTO
Returns the display name of the visitor.
getGapSize() - Method in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
Returns the reserved capacity buffer.
getGapSize() - Method in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Returns the reserved capacity buffer.
getGrabExpiresAt() - Method in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Returns when the active grab offer lapses, or null if none is active.
getGrabOfferedAt() - Method in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Returns when a freed slot was offered to this entry, or null if none is active.
getGrabWindowMinutes() - Static method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerConfig
How long an offered waiting-list grab stays claimable, in minutes.
getGuideId() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the identifier of the assigned guide, or null if none.
getHeadcount() - Method in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Returns the number of people in the party.
getHost() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns the host the client connected to.
getHost() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
Returns the client host name.
getId() - Method in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Returns the unique notification identifier.
getId() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns the unique request identifier.
getId() - Method in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Returns the unique park identifier.
getId() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the unique reservation identifier.
getId() - Method in class common.dto.UserDTO
Returns the unique user identifier.
getId() - Method in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Returns the unique visit identifier.
getId() - Method in class common.dto.VisitorDTO
Returns the national-ID-style visitor identifier.
getId() - Method in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Returns the unique waiting-list entry identifier.
getInstance() - Static method in class client.net.EventBus
Returns the singleton event bus instance.
getInstance() - Static method in class server.subscription.SubscriptionRegistry
Returns the singleton registry instance.
getIp() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
Returns the client IP address.
getKey() - Method in class client.net.EventBus.Subscription
Returns the resource this subscription is registered against; used by controllers to issue a matching UNSUBSCRIBE request on the wire when they detach locally.
getLanIPv4() - Static method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Returns the host's non-loopback IPv4 LAN addresses (best-effort).
getLoggedInActorId() - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Returns the id of the actor authenticated on this connection, or null if no one is logged in.
getLoggedInKind() - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Returns the single-login lock kind held by this connection ("USER"/"VISITOR"), or null if logged out.
getManagerId() - Method in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Returns the identifier of the park manager, or null if none.
getMaxCapacity() - Method in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
Returns the park's maximum physical capacity.
getMaxCapacity() - Method in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Returns the maximum visitor capacity.
getMessage() - Method in class common.dto.ServerResponse
Returns the status or error message.
getMyPark() - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Fetches the logged-in park manager's own park — no id is sent, so the server derives it from the session.
getName() - Method in class common.dto.ParkDTO
Returns the display name of the park.
getNewPriceCents() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationUpdateResultDTO
Returns the recomputed price after the edit, in cents.
getNewValue() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns the requested new value.
getNoShow() - Method in class common.dto.CancellationsReportRow
Returns reservations marked no-show that day.
getOldPriceCents() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationUpdateResultDTO
Returns the price before the edit, in cents.
getOldValue() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns the park's value for that field when the request was made.
getOp() - Method in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Returns which lifecycle transition the server has just committed.
getParkId() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns the park id the staff user belongs to, or null for non-park staff, visitors, or when logged out.
getParkId() - Method in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Returns the park filter, or null for the whole region (all parks).
getParkId() - Method in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
Returns the identifier of the park.
getParkId() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns the identifier of the target park.
getParkId() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the identifier of the booked park.
getParkId() - Method in class common.dto.UserDTO
Returns the identifier of the user's park, or null if none.
getParkId() - Method in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Returns the identifier of the park entered.
getParkId() - Method in class common.dto.VisitsReportDTO
Returns the park filter, or null for the whole region (all parks).
getParkId() - Method in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Returns the park the queued reservation is for (joined from the reservation).
getParkName() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns the display name of the target park.
getPartySize() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the number of people in the party.
getPartySize() - Method in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Returns the party size of the queued reservation (joined).
getPayload() - Method in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Returns a serializable snapshot of the entity after the change, or null when ServerEvent.getOp() is EventOp.DELETED.
getPhone() - Method in class common.dto.VisitorDTO
Returns the contact phone number on file, or null if none recorded.
getPollSeconds() - Static method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerConfig
How often the scheduler re-runs every registered job, in seconds.
getPort() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns the port the client connected to.
getPriceCents() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the price of the reservation, in cents.
getPriceCents() - Method in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Returns the price charged in cents (casual visits only), or null for a reservation visit.
getQueuedAt() - Method in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Returns when the visitor joined the queue (string DATETIME).
getRecipientUserId() - Method in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Returns the recipient staff user's id, or null for a visitor recipient.
getRecipientVisitorId() - Method in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Returns the recipient visitor's national id, or null for a staff recipient.
getReminderLeadHours() - Static method in class server.scheduler.SchedulerConfig
How far ahead of a visit the confirmation reminder fires, in hours (session b).
getRequestedBy() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns the id of the park manager who requested the change.
getRequesterName() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns the full name of the requesting park manager (joined in for display).
getReservation() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationUpdateResultDTO
Returns the reservation as persisted after the edit.
getReservationId() - Method in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Returns the identifier of the backing reservation, or null for a casual walk-in.
getReservationId() - Method in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Returns the identifier of the queued WAITING reservation.
getRole() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns the staff role, or null for a visitor / when logged out.
getRole() - Method in class common.dto.UserDTO
Returns the staff role governing the user's permissions.
getRoleLabel() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns a short chrome label for the logged-in identity: the staff role name for staff, "Subscriber"/"Visitor" for visitors, or "" when logged out.
getRows() - Method in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Returns the per-day rows, oldest first (quiet days omitted).
getRows() - Method in class common.dto.VisitsReportDTO
Returns the per-category rows (both "INDIVIDUALS" and "GROUPS").
getScheduler() - Method in class server.net.OrderServer
The server's timed-job runner — exposed so the server console can wire its manual "run now" triggers to SchedulerService.runNow(String) / SchedulerService.runAllNow().
getSentAt() - Method in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Returns the delivery timestamp (string form), or null if not yet delivered.
getSimulatedTarget() - Method in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Returns the recipient contact the message would be sent to (email/phone, or a staff username).
getStatus() - Method in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Returns the current lifecycle status of the request.
getStatus() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the current lifecycle state.
getStatus() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
Returns the client status.
getTimestamp() - Method in class common.dto.ServerEvent
Returns server-side wall-clock time (epoch millis) when the event was constructed.
getToDate() - Method in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Returns the inclusive range end, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
getToDate() - Method in class common.dto.VisitsReportDTO
Returns the inclusive range end, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
getTotalCancelled() - Method in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Returns total reservations cancelled across the whole range.
getTotalNoShow() - Method in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Returns total reservations marked no-show across the whole range.
getType() - Method in class common.dto.ClientRequest
Returns the type of this request.
getUser() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns the logged-in staff user, or null if none/visitor.
getUsername() - Method in class common.dto.UserDTO
Returns the login username.
getVisitCount() - Method in class common.dto.VisitsReportRow
Returns the number of visits in this category (open and closed).
getVisitDate() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the scheduled visit date, ISO yyyy-MM-dd.
getVisitDate() - Method in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Returns the visit date the queued reservation is for, ISO yyyy-MM-dd (joined).
getVisitor() - Method in class client.app.Session
Returns the logged-in visitor, or null if none/staff.
getVisitorId() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the identifier of the owning visitor.
getVisitorId() - Method in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Returns the identifier of the visitor, or null if anonymous.
getVisitorId() - Method in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
Returns the identifier of the owning visitor (joined).
getVisitTime() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the scheduled visit time (HH:mm:ss), or null if unset.
getVisitType() - Method in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Returns the nature of the visit.
getVisitType() - Method in class common.dto.VisitDTO
Returns the nature of the visit (casual visits only), or null for a reservation visit.
go(String) - Method in class client.app.Navigator
Navigates to the screen with the given id: hides the outgoing screen, loads and shows the new FXML, and marks the matching sidebar button active.
GoNatureClientApp - Class in client.boundary
Application entry point for the client.
GoNatureClientApp() - Constructor for class client.boundary.GoNatureClientApp
Creates the client application (instantiated by the JavaFX runtime).
GRAB_WINDOW_MINUTES - Static variable in class server.scheduler.SchedulerConfig
Minutes an offered waiting-list grab stays claimable.
grabExpiresAt - Variable in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
When the active grab offer lapses, or null if none is active.
grabOfferedAt - Variable in class common.dto.WaitlistEntryDTO
When a freed slot was offered to this entry, or null if none is active.
greetingLbl - Variable in class client.view.DashboardController
Greeting line ("Welcome back, …").
GROUP - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.VisitType
An organised group, typically led by a registered guide.
guideExists(long) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Checks whether a registered guide exists with the given visitor id.
guideField - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Guide-id input (GROUP visits only).
guideId - Variable in class common.dto.ReservationDTO
Identifier of the assigned guide, or null if none.
GuideRegisterController - Class in client.view
SERVICE_REP-only form that registers a visitor as a group guide.
GuideRegisterController(NetworkService, Session) - Constructor for class client.view.GuideRegisterController
Creates the guide-registration controller.
guideRow - Variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Row holding the guide-id field, shown only for GROUP visits.
